service.title: In the area of family law, our concentrations include the following:
service.heading: Business Law
service.desc: Business law is the primary area of our practice.  In this area of practice, our law firm manages litigation as well as other types of legal risks and exposure for local and out of state businesses.  Our law firm also defends companies, corporations, boards of directors, shareholders, and business men and women in connection with complex and contested matters.  Additionally, we will represent our clients as plaintiffs when the circumstances are appropriate to prosecute illegal business activity.  We are also able to provide quality general legal consultation to businesses, business owners, managers, corporate directors and officers, and various types of boards.  In this capacity, our law firm can serve not only as a litigator for a particular business organization, but also as outside general counsel to certain types of business organizations, depending on the size of that organization and its legal needs.
service.descTwo: We also recognize that litigation may not be the best option for a given matter.  Businesses often require litigation deterrence to avoid financial exposure, publicity, and other uncertainties that accommodate litigation.  In the area of litigation deterrence, we will carefully counsel businesses or persons out of a potentially litigious situation or during the contracting phase of a business arrangement or joint venture agreement in order to deter future unnecessary and expensive litigation.
service.descThree: From small representing small businesses to representing businesses with hundreds of employees, our law firm has the experience and ability to aggressively and successfully handle the litigation needs of our business clients.

card.title: In the area of business law, our concentrations include the following:
card.desc: Most importantly, our legal teams works closely with the client in order to accomplish a result specifically tailored to the client personal needs and preferences.

service.title: In the area of family law, our concentrations include the following:
service.heading: Family Law
service.desc: Family law litigation continues to be an important area of concentration for our law firm.  We are trusted advisors to individuals forced to navigate through the complex area of law known as family law which involves divorce, custody, support, community property, protective orders, etc. We are there for our clients during these exceptionally trying times, fighting for their interests and their families and protecting their property. We regularly handle complex and highly contested divorces, community property, and custody cases.  As a domestic litigation law firm, we also regularly handle the unique aspects of this type of litigation, which includes Hearing Officer Conferences, Judge trials, and expedited proceedings.  Most importantly, our legal teams works closely with the client in order to accomplish a result specifically tailored to the client's personal needs and preferences.

service.title: In the area of family law, our concentrations include the following:
service.heading: Personal Injury Law
service.desc: We proudly represent individuals who have been seriously injured as a result of the fault of another. In this area of our practice, we passionately represent injured parties with the absolute highest standards of professionalism and ethics. Our personal injury clients have oftentimes sustained life-changing injuries as a result of the fault of another and we will facilitate the absolute best medical treatment for the injured client while fighting aggressively to obtain a maximum recovery from the responsible parties. We also expedite our personal injury practice in order to facilitate a timely and fair recovery for our injured clients.

service.title: In the area of successions law, our concentrations include the following:
service.heading: Successions Law
service.homeLink: At JOSHUA D. ALLISON, A Professional Law Corporation,
service.desc: We guide families and individuals through the Louisiana succession process with care, precision, and dedication.  Louisiana's succession laws are unique in the nation, rooted in the civil law tradition, and navigating them requires an attorney with specialized knowledge and experience.  Whether a loved one has passed with or without a will, our law firm is equipped to handle the legal process of transferring property, assets, and obligations to the rightful heirs.  We understand that the loss of a loved one is an emotional and difficult time, and we strive to make the legal process as smooth and efficient as possible so that our clients can focus on what matters most.  Our law firm handles both simple and complex successions, including those involving multiple heirs, contested wills, and significant estates.

card.title: In the area of successions law, our concentrations include the following:
card.desc: Most importantly, our legal team works closely with families and heirs to ensure the succession process is handled efficiently and in full compliance with Louisiana's unique civil law requirements.

list.text: Transfer of Immovable and Movable Property
